# Security Policy

Thanks for helping keep this project and its users safe.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please do **not** open a public issue or pull request.

Instead, please report it privately by email.

Please include as much detail as possible, such as:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce it
- Affected versions, if known
- Possible impact
- Any suggested fix or mitigation

I will do my best to investigate the report and respond in a reasonable timeframe.

## Responsible Disclosure

Please avoid publicly disclosing the issue until I’ve had a chance to investigate and release a fix.

After a fix is available, I may share a short disclosure note and thank the reporter if they would like to be credited.

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are generally only provided for the latest version of this project.
